MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2005 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-22-2004 Continued To Oct-07-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-07-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Michael Kelly, Esq. for Petitioner: Michael Niland, present as Guardian at litem for and with: Eric Niland, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise of $250,000.00 is approved.
Attorney's Fees $186,290.67
Costs $4,837.31
A net balance of $58,872.02 to be depositted into a blocked account with Bank of America, pacifica Branch, 1375 Linda Mar Center, Pacifica, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order for Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-23-2004 Set For Trial On May-16-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Apr-25-05 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 220
